# Size Guide

The Acme Shop provides detailed sizing charts for various product categories, including apparel, footwear, and accessories, to help customers choose the right fit. Each category features specific measurements such as chest, waist, and inseam for clothing, and foot length and width for footwear, with units available in both inches and centimeters. Customers are encouraged to take accurate measurements at home using a flexible tape measure, and if unsure between sizes, it's advised to size up for comfort. The shop also offers free exchanges within 30 days for size issues, and customer service is available for any additional queries.

[Source: product_information.md#size-guide]
